title: Fix Metrics PDF Export: Landscape Orientation and Suppress ID Column
story: As a DataTools Pro user exporting metrics, I want the PDF to use landscape orientation and exclude the ID and action columns, so that the exported document is readable and professional.
description:
The PDF export from the metrics DataTable was truncating columns due to portrait orientation. Two fixes needed:

1. Set PDF page orientation to landscape
2. Suppress the ID column and action column from the export
3. Export only visible columns
acceptance_criteria: ID column is excluded from the PDF export
Action column is excluded from the PDF export
Only visible columns are included in the export
ux_changes: PDF export changed to landscape orientation. ID and action columns excluded from export output.
implementation_notes: Configured DataTable PDF export options: orientation set to landscape, export restricted to visible columns, ID and action columns excluded.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed landscape orientation was achievable and implemented it along with column filtering. Submitted for review.
